title: Elevated tensions in Middle East push oil prices higher
section_path: Elevated tensions in Middle East push oil prices higher
section_path_text: Elevated tensions in Middle East push oil prices higher
summary:
Main
Elevated geopolitical risks saw energy markets push higher last week. However, mixed signals on China's economy weighed on sentiment in industrial metal markets. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-02-12 11.48.24.png | assets/2024-02-12_elevated-tensions-in-middle-east-push-oil-prices-higher_img_screenshot2024-02-12114824_201cae98df0a.png
Crude oil rallied last week as the prospect of a ceasefire agreement in Gaza diminished.
